About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker-long Today's data shows LINC as the dominant performer, ranking #1 with an exceptional score of 95.0 driven by extraordinary long-term momentum—1486.54% return over 10 years and 512.22% over 5 years, both far exceeding SPY by 1264.64% and 444.37% respectively. The momentum is consistently strong across all timeframes with all four moving averages (SMA30/50/100/200) in bullish alignment and a "clean" momentum signal with "strong_buy" flag, though notably the 6-month return of 73.51% shows a deceleration ratio of 1.12x compared to 3-month gains. MPC ranks #2 with a 63.27% one-year return and solid 5-year performance of 341.48%, but shows weaker relative outperformance versus SPY (46.34% over 1y) and displays a concerning 6-month ratio of 0.52x, indicating recent momentum stalling. Both stocks pass 4 out of 5 momentum ratio thresholds and maintain all major moving average supports, but LINC's vastly superior multi-decade returns and consistent outperformance across equities and commodities distinguish it as significantly stronger on this long-term
